allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('src/App.tsx', 'utf8'\); const lines = content.split\('\\n'\); let depth = 0; for \(let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++\) { const line = lines[i]; for \(const c of line\) { if \(c === '[' || c === '{' || c === '\('\) depth++; if \(c === ']' || c === '}' || c === '\)'\) depth--; } if \(depth < 0\) { console.log\('ERROR at line', i+1, ':', line.trim\(\)\); break; } } console.log\('Done, final depth:', depth\);")
